description_long: This is a large, multi-story residential house with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The front facade features two levels of covered balconies with white railings and numerous evenly spaced windows, giving it a symmetrical and inviting appearance. The rear of the house opens up to a spacious outdoor area with a large swimming pool, hot tub, and multiple lounge chairs, all surrounded by a white fence. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely painted siding, and the windows are large, allowing for ample natural light. The house includes both open and enclosed spaces, with visible staircases and multiple access points to the outdoor amenities. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern elements, suitable for a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A large, multi-story house with a gable roof, covered balconies, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool and lounge area. The exterior is light-colored with symmetrical windows and white railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two levels of covered balconies, symmetrical windows, and the main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive pool, hot tub, lounge chairs, and large windows opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the balconies, extensive window arrangements, and the pool area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with covered porch, double doors, and decorative white railings
